Comment.MultiLanguageText: HMI: rising edge -> initialize 16-box 4-layer palletizing path (path runs from box 1 layer 1 through box 16 layer 4, 3 phases per box approach/place/retract)

HMI: rising edge -> start palletizing cycle (i16_PalletStep := 1). Permissive checks: bo_Mode AND bo_ESTOP_LOCK AND bo_PalletInitialed AND NOT bo_Alarm AND NOT GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode (ABCDE mutex) AND NOT GDB_ManualCmd.bo_Mode (manual mutex).
HMI: rising edge -> stop palletizing cycle (i16_PalletStep := 0)

HMI: rising edge pauses the palletizing cycle (R6). FB_AxisCtrl halts motion mid-trajectory via MC_GroupInterrupt - the SCARA stays servo-enabled and holds position, a gripped box stays gripped; i16_PalletStep goes to 75. Resume with the Start button. Stop / E-Stop override Pause.

HMI: Palletizing AUTO mode selector (TRUE = palletizing cycle enabled, FALSE = ignored). Mutually exclusive with GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode (ABCDE cycle) and GDB_ManualCmd.bo_Mode (manual). Operator must turn other modes off before enabling palletizing.
Safety: E-Stop chain healthy (TRUE = OK, FALSE = E-Stop active). Mirrors GDB_MachineCmd.bo_ESTOP_LOCK convention.
Status: 16-box 4-layer palletizing path has been initialized (set after bo_InitPallet rising edge inside FB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing REGION 1)
Status: any palletizing-specific alarm (placeholder; always FALSE in C69 Phase 2.2 demo)

Main palletizing state machine. 0 = idle, 1..48 = active path point (16 boxes x 3 phases). Step encoding: box_index = ((step-1) DIV 3) + 1; phase = ((step-1) MOD 3) + 1 [1=approach, 2=place, 3=retract]. Cycle wraps 48 -> 1. Layer = ((box_index-1) DIV 4) + 1 (4 layers, 4 boxes per layer).

Status: total boxes in the active palletizing path. Module C (2026-05-22): COMPUTED by the FB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing builder at each bo_InitPallet pulse = i16_LayerCount * i16_GridRowsY * i16_GridColsX (no longer a hardcoded 16). StartValue 16 is only the pre-init default.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Status — pulses TRUE when all 16 boxes have been placed (statBoxesPlaced = statActiveBoxes). HMI lamp / cycle-complete indicator. Cleared on next bo_InitPallet rising edge.

V3.0 (2026-05-19): if TRUE the cycle waits for PalletizingSensor rising edge before each pick (real container-arrival gating); if FALSE the cycle proceeds without sensor (phantom mode for PLC-only smoke testing). Default TRUE.

Pick position WCS X (mm) where the cup grabs the box. Corrected 2026-05-21 to 1269.07: the box rests at COM X=1269.07 (NX Runtime Inspector Trace1.csv); the previous 1170.44 (probed sensor-centre) was ~99 mm off, giving an off-centre grab.

V3.0 (Brief 33, 2026-05-19): Pick position WCS Y (mm). Default -468.24 from latest nx_open_probe (conveyor migrated -1000 in Y since Brief 32; csContainerBeltPalletizing sensor now at Y=-468.24). Was 531.76 in Brief 31/32.

Pick position WCS Z (mm) -- suction cup contact target = box TOP. Corrected 2026-05-21 to -919.86: the box rests at COM Z=-973.61 (NX Trace1.csv) and the container collision body is 107.5 mm tall, so box top = -973.61 + 53.75 = -919.86. The previous -699.0 sat 221 mm above the box top, so the cup never reached the box.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Z offset above pick (mm) for safe approach + retract. Default 220.0 matches PICK_APPROACH_Z = -800.0 from nx_open_probe (-1018.85 + 218.85 ≈ 220).
V3.0 (Brief 33, 2026-05-19): Pallet 1 North top centre WCS X (mm). Default -1100.48 from latest nx_open_probe (pallets migrated -1100 in X since Brief 32). Was -0.48 in Brief 31/32.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Pallet 1 North top centre WCS Y (mm). Default 1500.31 from nx_open_probe.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Pallet 1 North top WCS Z (mm) — bottom layer place target. Default -866.73 from nx_open_probe.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Z offset above each box's place target (mm) for approach + retract phases. Default 100.0.

V3.0 (2026-05-19, Brief 32 corrected): Box height (mm) — layer-to-layer Z spacing for the 4-layer stack + cup-tip offset above pallet surface. Default 200.0 (small carton in current NX scene). Tune to 300 for the bigger box variant. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen from recipe.product.lr_Height; DO NOT hand-edit, edit the recipe instead.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Conveyor belt velocity (mm/s) when running between picks. Default 100.0. Belt stops to 0 during pick (auto by FB).
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Settle time (ms) after PalletizingSensor TRUE + belt stopped before SCARA descends to pick. Default 300.0.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Suction cup grip hold time (ms) after bo_gripperGrip:=TRUE before raising. Default 300.0.
V3.0 (2026-05-19): Suction cup release time (ms) after bo_gripperGrip:=FALSE and bo_gripperRelease:=TRUE before retract. Default 200.0.

V3.0 DEPRECATED (2026-05-19, Brief 33 adaptive): No longer referenced by FB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing.scl after the spawn-delay logic was rewritten to fire spawn immediately at Phase 6 PLACE_RETRACT done. The cycle now self-paces via belt-transit + sensor-arrival in Phase 7, with no fixed inter-box delay. Member retained for shape backward compatibility; value ignored. To re-introduce a fixed delay, reference this Member in a new IF-timer block in the FB.

V3.0 (Brief 33, 2026-05-19): SCARA suction-cup wrist-to-TCP X offset for SCL compensation. Default 0.0 — Brief 33 revealed the gripper is an 8-cup symmetric array (4x2) whose centroid is directly below the wrist axis, so X offset is 0. (Brief 31's +336 was a single-corner-cup measurement, since superseded.) Kept as a tunable Member for operator overrides; normally leave at 0.
V3.0 (Brief 33, 2026-05-19): Y component, default 0.0. See lr_WristOffsetX comment — cup array centroid is on wrist axis, so X/Y offsets are 0.

V3.0 (Brief 33, 2026-05-19): Z component, default 0.0. The 135.7 mm cup-tip-below-wrist offset is now handled by ScaraArm3D.Tool[1].Frame.z = 135.7 in the TIA TO (operator updated). MC_MoveLinearAbsolute commands TCP (cup tip) directly; kinematic group computes wrist position via Tool[1]. (Brief 31's +135.7 SCL compensation is no longer needed since Tool[1] now carries the full vertical offset.) Operator may set this Member non-zero if a different tool is loaded.

Module C config (2026-05-22): number of stacked layers. Default 4. Total boxes = i16_LayerCount * i16_GridRowsY * i16_GridColsX (the builder computes that into i16_TotalBoxes). Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen from GDB_ActiveRecipe.recipe.pallet.i16_LayerCount each scan — DO NOT hand-edit; edit the recipe instead.

Module C config (2026-05-22): boxes per layer along WCS X. Default 2. The per-layer grid is i16_GridRowsY x i16_GridColsX. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen — auto-fitted from recipe product+pallet dims; DO NOT hand-edit.
Module C config (2026-05-22): boxes per layer along WCS Y. Default 2. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen — auto-fitted from recipe product+pallet dims; DO NOT hand-edit.

Module C config (2026-05-22): box-to-box pitch (mm) along WCS X. Default 400.0 - a 2-col grid then sits at +/-200 mm from the pallet centre, reproducing the pre-Module-C hard-coded layout. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen as recipe.product.lr_Length + recipe.product.lr_Gap; DO NOT hand-edit.

Module C config (2026-05-22): box-to-box pitch (mm) along WCS Y. Default 600.0 - a 2-row grid then sits at +/-300 mm from the pallet centre. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen as recipe.product.lr_Width + recipe.product.lr_Gap; DO NOT hand-edit.

Module C config (2026-05-22): path velocity (mm/s) written into every palletizing move command by the builder. Default 2000.0. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen from recipe.dynamics.lr_Velocity; DO NOT hand-edit.

Module C config (2026-05-22): acceleration for palletizing moves, fed to GDB_AxisCtrl.LKinCtrl.input.movelinear.r64_acceleration at dispatch. Default 10000.0. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen from recipe.dynamics.lr_Acceleration; DO NOT hand-edit.
Module C config (2026-05-22): deceleration for palletizing moves. Default 10000.0. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen from recipe.dynamics.lr_Deceleration; DO NOT hand-edit.
Module C config (2026-05-22): jerk for palletizing moves. Default 100000.0. Module D (2026-05-23): now sole-written by FB_PatternAutoGen from recipe.dynamics.lr_Jerk; DO NOT hand-edit.

AttributeList.Text: Wang Shuo / Huashili-style command + status struct for C69 Phase 2.2 16-box 4-layer palletizing cycle. Sibling DB to GDB_MachineCmd (ABCDE 5-point) and GDB_ManualCmd (manual mode, STAGED_FOR_PHASE_2). HMI binds palletizing buttons here. Mode arbitration via 3-way mutex: GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode XOR GDB_PalletizingCmd.bo_Mode XOR GDB_ManualCmd.bo_Mode.
